name: REFERENCE_MP4_VISUAL_CHECKPOINT_MATRIX_20260626_060212

currentCandidateComparison.topHudFinding: Reference normal-battle top HUD is near y~0.03-0.14, while current BATTLE57 top HUD appears around y~0.19-0.28 in the 1080p capture.
currentCandidateComparison.bottomCardFinding: Reference cards occupy y~0.80-1.00 with frames/icons; current BATTLE57 mostly shows detached labels/glows and lacks complete card frames/icons.
currentCandidateComparison.actorFinding: BATTLE57 proves a source-backed local actor subset, but not the complete reference formation or payload.

rootCauseSplitUpdatedFromVideo: Aspect/view-rect mismatch is a first-order blocker for any coordinate comparison.
HUD route placement is also wrong after accounting for aspect.
Actor visibility is a local-subset state, not a complete roster state.
Skill visual playback is blocked by Timeline type/binding/runtime gaps, not only missing particles.
MainInterface video confirms visual density and aspect, but does not supply runtime activity/redpoint/account state.
safeNextValidationRules: Normalize every reference comparison to a 2.24:1 render area before evaluating coordinates.
Validate route active state, sibling order, mask/stencil, and TMP scale/autosize as a bundle.
Use sample_007 and sample_012 as normal-battle layout references.
Use sample_013, sample_015, and sample_018 only as skill overlay and Timeline/mask/stencil references.
Keep 참고.mp4 auxiliary; it cannot replace missing original xLua/GameEntry/LuaManager, exact actor bundles, or approved runtime UI snapshots.
